backend/main.mo: Motoko canister storing predefined categories and ingredients, letting each user save daily meal records and query categories, ingredients, or their own records.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping features to affected frontend files, components, tests, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing the purpose of each frontend file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS theme definitions using OKLCH variables for light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: Base HTML entry point loading the React app and linking favicon and app icons.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router routes and global providers, including theme and toaster, with an error boundary.
frontend/src/components/AppLayout.tsx: Layout component providing header navigation, containerized main content, and a footer.
frontend/src/components/BackendConnectio: UI card that displays backend connection errors with optional message and retry button.
Exports predefined ingredient list and helper for filtering by category.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook creating and caching the backend actor, auto-refreshing on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActorDiagnostics.t: Helper hook exposing actor readiness, error state, and a retry mechanism.
frontend/src/hooks/useDailyForm.ts: Manages daily form state for ingredients, providing update, validation, preparation, and reset helpers.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity auth context with login, logout, status tracking, and persisted identity handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks to fetch and save daily records, including encoding and decoding of backend data.
frontend/src/index.css: Sets Tailwind base styles and CSS variables for light and dark themes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Initializes the app root with React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/pages/DailyEntryPage.tsx: UI for entering daily ingredient data, saving records, and copying vendor-ready text.
frontend/src/pages/HistoryPage.tsx: Displays a list of saved records with retry handling and navigation to detail pages.
frontend/src/pages/RecordDetailPage.tsx: Shows details of a single saved record with CSV export and clipboard copy options.
frontend/src/types/dailyForm.ts: Type definitions for ingredient form data, validated entries, and saved daily records.
frontend/src/utils/csvExport.ts: Generates a CSV from a SavedDailyRecord and triggers a file download with a date-based filename.
frontend/src/utils/recordPlainText.ts: Formats a SavedDailyRecord into grouped plain-text output by category for vendor-friendly copying.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with typography, container queries, animations, custom colors, fonts, and layout settings.
project_state.json: Describes the project’s state, requirements, existing features, issues, and architectural notes for the inventory app.
